text: Love the new dashboard, finally easy to find reports!

Everything feels much slower since the update, pages take forever to load.
Crash on checkout. Lost my cart.
Onboarding flow is smoother now, nice work team.
I keep getting a spinning loader on the home screen.
Why is the API so slow today? Timeouts everywhere.
Beautiful update, the animations are great.
Payment error: gateway returned an unknown failure.

Notifications are working properly again, thanks.
The new feature is confusing, I cannot find the export button.
Love it! The new layout is intuitive.
Latency is unacceptable, 5 second page loads.

Crash during checkout, second time this week.
